name: ASUS PRIME B650M-A AX6 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7600+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ax 2x2 Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS PRIME B650M-A AX6 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Compact Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support, triple M.2 slots, and WiFi 6.
